name: CREAMY RED BELL PEPPER SAUCE
subtitle: LEMON JUICE, RED WINE VINEGAR, TAMARI
intro: I CREATED THIS SAUCE specifically for Lil’ Tofu Po’Boys, but it could be substituted for mayonnaise in almost any application.

ingredients.item: red bell pepper, roasted (see sidebar), seeded, and cut into a few large slices

method: With a clean kitchen towel, pat the bell pepper slices dry. Put the pepper in a blender. Add the tofu, mayonnaise, oil, lemon juice, vinegar, tamari, garlic, paprika, salt, pepper, maple syrup, and mustard and process until smooth and creamy. Use immediately or store in a tightly sealed jar in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
